prompt:
Standardize all preview workflows per the design in issue #24.

## Overview
Preview environments should be lightweight and ephemeral. No DNS records, no commits to infra. Use Fly.io's built-in \*.fly.dev domains and `--override-input` to build the PR's actual code.

## Changes needed

### 1. Rename flux preview workflow
Rename `.github/workflows/preview.yml` → `.github/workflows/flux-preview.yml`
Update the workflow name from 'Deploy Preview' to 'Deploy Flux Preview'

### 2. Remove DNS jobs from ALL preview workflows
Delete the `deploy-dns` and `cleanup-dns` jobs entirely from:
- flux-preview.yml (currently preview.yml)
- balance-preview.yml

These jobs create/delete Porkbun DNS CNAME records for `preview-{PR}.{app}.gunk.dev`. We're replacing this with Fly.io's built-in `{app}-preview-{PR}.fly.dev` domain which works immediately.

### 3. Remove 'Configure preview domain' step
Delete the step that runs `fly certs create` for the custom preview domain. Not needed with fly.dev.

### 4. Use --override-input to build PR's actual code
The dispatch payload from app repos includes `pr_number`. We also need `head_sha` to build the right code. For now, accept it from the payload if present, otherwise the build uses whatever's in flake.lock (backwards compat).

Update the 'Build OCI image' step:
```yaml
- name: Build OCI image
  env:
    HEAD_SHA: ${{ github.event.client_payload.head_sha }}
  run: |
    if [ -n "$HEAD_SHA" ]; then
      nix build .#oci-image --override-input flux "github:gunk-dev/flux/$HEAD_SHA"
    else
      nix build .#oci-image
    fi
```

Adapt the flake output name and input name for each app:
- Flux: `.#oci-image`, input `flux`
- Balance: `.#balance-oci-image`, input `balance`

### 5. Fix flux preview deploy method
The current flux preview uses the deprecated `--docker-image file://` flag (already broken).
Replace with the docker load → push → --image pattern (same as balance-preview.yml):
```yaml
- name: Deploy to Fly.io
  env:
    FLY_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.FLY_API_TOKEN }}
    PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.client_payload.pr_number }}
  run: |
    APP_NAME="flux-preview-${PR_NUMBER}"
    
    if ! nix develop -c fly apps list --org gunk-dev | grep -q "^${APP_NAME}"; then
      nix develop -c fly apps create "${APP_NAME}" --org gunk-dev
    fi
    
    docker load < result
    nix develop -c fly auth docker
    docker tag flux:latest "registry.fly.io/${APP_NAME}:latest"
    docker push "registry.fly.io/${APP_NAME}:latest"
    
    nix develop -c fly deploy \
      --config fly.toml \
      --app "${APP_NAME}" \
      --image "registry.fly.io/${APP_NAME}:latest"
```

### 6. Update PR comment to use fly.dev URL
Change the comment step to post the fly.dev URL instead of custom domain:
```yaml
- name: Comment preview URL on PR
  env:
    GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.client_payload.pr_number }}
  run: |
    APP_NAME="{app}-preview-${PR_NUMBER}"
    gh pr comment "${PR_NUMBER}" \
      --repo gunk-dev/{app} \
      --body "Preview deployed: https://${APP_NAME}.fly.dev"
```

Note: the current balance-preview.yml still references `patflynn/balance` in the comment. Fix to `gunk-dev/balance`. Similarly flux references `patflynn/flux` — fix to `gunk-dev/flux`.

### 7. Simplify cleanup jobs
With no DNS, cleanup just needs to destroy the Fly app. Merge cleanup-dns and cleanup-app into a single `cleanup` job:
```yaml
cleanup:
  if: github.event.action == '{app}-preview-cleanup'
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  environment: preview
  permissions:
    contents: read
  steps:
    - name: Validate inputs
      env:
        PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.client_payload.pr_number }}
      run: |
        if [[ ! "$PR_NUMBER" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then
          echo "Error: pr_number must be a positive integer" >&2
          exit 1
        fi
    - uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@e50d5f73bfe71c2dd0aa4218de8f4afa59f8f81d # v16
    - name: Destroy preview app
      env:
        FLY_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.FLY_API_TOKEN }}
        PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.client_payload.pr_number }}
      run: nix develop -c fly apps destroy "{app}-preview-${PR_NUMBER}" -y
```

### 8. Create web-preview.yml
Model on the updated flux-preview.yml but for web:
- Event types: `web-preview`, `web-preview-cleanup`
- OCI image: `.#web-oci-image`
- Override input: `gunk-web`
- App name: `gunk-web-preview-{PR}`
- Comment repo: `gunk-dev/gunk-web`

### Files to modify
- `.github/workflows/preview.yml` → rename to `.github/workflows/flux-preview.yml`
- `.github/workflows/balance-preview.yml` → update (remove DNS, fix deploy, update comment)
- Create `.github/workflows/web-preview.yml`

### Files to NOT modify
- Do NOT touch staging or prod workflows (separate PR)
- Do NOT modify dns/ directory or cmd/dns (keep for manual use)

## Acceptance criteria
- preview.yml renamed to flux-preview.yml
- All three preview workflows (flux, balance, web) have identical structure
- No DNS jobs in any preview workflow
- PR comments use fly.dev URLs
- Repo references updated from patflynn/* to gunk-dev/*
- --override-input used when head_sha is provided in payload
- Flux preview uses docker load/push pattern (not deprecated --docker-image)
- Cleanup is a single job (just destroy app, no DNS)
- YAML is valid
